title: SHG  font
description: Every text is now written with the same font as SHG
body:
This pack changes the font in your Minecraft to SHG's roadmap font. Version 1, the old SHG font, has poor readability and isn't recommended. Version 2, the current SHG font, is highly readable and clear.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8c3723b467b7bc49b87c92c2e4519e47107c9a2.png)
![MC UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/884234c89910a8e92f2666b603cb3edef6b2d5e8.jpeg)![MC UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b24997d475b64b23801eec1d0539c424f19441f.jpeg)![MC UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0363f971b94304ea1d8daf7483f5ab54ff5b666c.jpeg)
